# JDK-8348870: Eliminate array bound checks in DecimalDigits

> **PR**: [23335](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/23335) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

---

## Summary

Expand DIGITS length to 128 and eliminate array bounds checking by using & 0x7F when accessing DIGITS
